arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich to offer Mykhaylo Mudryk a lifeline from Chelsea?; Bayern players frustrated with lack of communication from coach; Liverpool could be a player for Jamal Musiala; More Harry Kane vs. Erling Haaland talk; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich has been linked to Chelsea FC attacker Mykhaylo Mudryk several times in the past, but now — given the London team’s laughably big squad — there could be an opportunity for the Bavarians to grab a player on a bargain deal (depending on how much Chelsea wants to unload the Ukrainian): kicker reports that several Bayern Munich players are becoming irritated by Vincent Kompany’s lack of communication when it comes to the squad.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane stressed importance of penalties after Bayern Munich’s 9-2 thrashing of Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: For the most part in Bayern Munich ’s 9-2 thrashing of Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League, it was one way traffic, but the Croatian side did have their bright spell when they scored two goals in as many minutes to start the second. Since he has joined Bayern from Tottenham last summer, he has now scored a total of 13 penalties for the Rekordmeister, and he admitted that, even as a regular penalty-taker, he was not used to taken three in one match.

arts.ttl: Max Eberl says João Palhinha is exactly the destroyer in midfield that Bayern Munich needed
arts.sum: João comes from the Premier League, a different league,” Max Eberl said (as captured by Twitter account @iMiaSanMia ). He needed time to adapt to everything - to how Vinnie wants to play.

arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer and Vincent Kompany have polarizing takes on Leon Goretzka’s situation at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Manuel Neuer and Vincent Kompany were asked about this after the Holstein Kiel game (where Leon was left out of the matchday squad) and these were the answers they gave (both captured by Twitter account @iMiaSanMia) Leon Goretzka has basically seen any chance of him being a starting player at Bayern Munich disappear upon the arrival of Vincent Kompany, and he still wouldn’t leave despite the club openly telling him that he ought to find another club.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel has the full backing of Christoph Freund to succeed at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Mathys Tel is one of Bayern Munich ’s key players, despite playing a limited role to help him develop properly. He has made it clear that it will not be an issue for him and will be ready when the club needs him, and that kind of drive is what sporting director Christoph Freund sees in the 19-year-old Frenchman.

arts.ttl: Preview: Werder Bremen vs. Bayern Munich - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Werder Bremen and Bayern Munich, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Rekordmeister’s Records: Bayern Munich’s 9-2 decimation of Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League – We haven’t seen anything yet from Michael Olise
arts.sum: Michael Olise is the first Frenchman to score 2+ goals on his Champions League debut since Thierry Henry in 1997. A couple months ago, Arsenal FC and France legend Thierry Henry managed Bayern’s new signing Michael Olise with the French junior squad and famously quipped that “ you haven’t seen anything yet ” with regards to Olise’s potential.

arts.ttl: Name of the Allianz Arena address changes as tribute to the late Franz Beckenbauer
arts.sum: The city of Munich has approved renaming the address of the Allianz Arena and the area in front of the stadium ‘Franz-Beckenbauer-Platz 5’, in tribute to the late Franz Beckenbauer. When one arrives at Werner-Heisenberg-Allee 25D-80939 München, one arrives at the stadium of Bayern Munich, the Allianz Arena.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 10: Introducing a new show; Bayern Munich got another coached sacked; Some praise for Vincent Kompany; Mathys Tel to leave Bayern?; Fans battling over Thomas Müller’s role; and MORE!
arts.sum: Introducing a new show to our lineup: “Bavarian Podcast Works — LoneStar Locks” — which will focus on sports betting and gambling. Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: BFW Analysis: Crafting a consistent system for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: This first shape is what the team inhabits against opposition that like to build-up with a 2-3 structure, which is to say, two outfield players as the first line with a line of three just ahead of them (in this case, two centre-backs, a single midfielder dropped deep and the full-backs). Every single player in passing range is marked, meaning the full-back has no option but to dribble it out or somehow find the players on the opposite side of the pitch by looping it over the entire team — something that still requires getting past Olise and Kimmich who are not tied down to a man and are free to intercept the pass without breaking structure.
